rulings.Case Title: JAMES SPRUELL et al. VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 22, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with final leave to amend to address status of lease and allege facts supporting all elements of tortious interference with contractual relations 6th cause of action.=(501/REQ)
